landing.heroSubtitle: The gamified learning platform for builders. Earn XP, collect on-chain credentials, and level up your Solana skills.
landing.onChainCredentialsDesc: Earn verifiable ZK compressed credentials on Solana. Your achievements live forever on-chain.
landing.gamifiedLearningDesc: Earn XP, maintain streaks, unlock achievements, and climb the leaderboard as you learn.
landing.handsonCodingDesc: Write and run Solana programs directly in the browser with our integrated code editor.
landing.communityDrivenDesc: Join thousands of developers building on Solana across Latin America and beyond.
landing.step1Desc: Sign in with your Solana wallet. Your progress is tied to your on-chain identity.
landing.step2Desc: Follow structured courses with hands-on coding challenges in a browser-based IDE.
landing.step3Desc: Complete courses to earn XP, level up, and receive verifiable on-chain credentials.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to start building on Solana?
landing.ctaDescription: Connect your wallet, choose a learning path, and earn verifiable on-chain credentials as you learn.

courses.noResults: No courses found matching your filters.

lesson.courseCompleteDesc: You've completed all lessons in this course.
lesson.finalizeFailed: Could not finalize. Please try again.

dashboard.noActivity: No recent activity. Start a course to begin!
dashboard.onChainCredentialsDesc: Complete career tracks to earn verifiable ZK compressed credentials on Solana.
dashboard.noRecommendations: Complete more courses to get personalized recommendations.
dashboard.noActivityHint: Complete lessons to see your activity here.
dashboard.demoBanner: Viewing demo data. Connect your wallet to track your real progress.

walletGate.label: SUPERTEAM ACADEMY
walletGate.heading: Dashboard
walletGate.subtext: Connect your wallet to unlock your learning progress, XP, and on-chain credentials.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.demoNotice: Showing demo leaderboard data. Real data appears as learners earn XP on-chain.
leaderboard.noLearnersDesc: Leaderboard data will appear as learners earn XP.

profile.noCredentials: No credentials yet. Complete courses to earn on-chain credentials!
profile.noAchievements: No achievements unlocked yet. Keep learning!
profile.demoBanner: Viewing demo profile. Connect your wallet to see your real data.
profile.noCredentialsHint: Complete courses to earn verifiable on-chain credentials.

settings.title: Settings
settings.streakRemindersDesc: Daily reminders to maintain your streak
settings.publicProfileDesc: Allow others to view your profile, skills, and achievements
settings.showOnLeaderboardDesc: Display your name and rank on the public leaderboard
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your profile data, achievements, and credentials as JSON
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently remove your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone. Your on-chain credentials will remain on Solana.
settings.darkModeNote: Dark mode is the platform default.

certificate.title: Certificate of Completion
certificate.demoNotice: Viewing demo certificate. Connect your wallet to see your real credentials.
certificate.shareText: I earned the {course} credential on Superteam Academy!

certificates.title: Credentials
certificates.subtitle: Verifiable on-chain certificates earned through learning
certificates.demoBannerDescription: Connect your Solana wallet to view your real on-chain credentials and certificates.
certificates.noCredentialsDescription: Complete courses to earn verifiable on-chain credentials as ZK compressed credentials on Solana.
certificates.onChainFooter: Credentials are fetched from on-chain enrollment data and Metaplex Core assets.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Get notified about new courses, features, and Solana ecosystem updates.
newsletter.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
